summary: Completed testing of P2/P3 features: Horizontal Scaling Infrastructure, Historical Confidence Score Tracking, Services Australia Age Pension API, CGT Optimization, and Partner Comparison. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed all 6 tabs working (Modeling, Scenarios, History, Partner, AI, Settings). History tab displays confidence score chart. Partner comparison shows synergy benefits.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - minor rendering issue that doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Route URL mismatch: Frontend route is /confidence-engine but documentation may reference /retirement-confidence - ensure consistency
seed_data_creation: Historical data auto-generated for demo clients by _generate_sample_history() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2/P3 features fully tested. All 5 new backend route files working: scaling_infrastructure.py, confidence_history.py, services_australia.py, cgt_optimizer.py, partner_comparison.py. Frontend has 6 tabs in Confidence Engine (Modeling, Scenarios, History, Partner, AI, Settings). History tab fetches from /api/confidence-history/client/demo_client/chart-data. Partner comparison uses POST /api/partner-comparison/quick-compare. Correct frontend route is /confidence-engine (not /retirement-confidence).

scaling_infrastructure.scaling_config: PASS - GET /api/infrastructure/scaling/config returns config for 20,000 users

confidence_history.milestones: PASS - GET /api/confidence-history/client/{client_id}/milestones returns significant score changes

services_australia.age_eligibility: PASS - GET /api/services-australia/eligibility/age returns pension age calculation
services_australia.pension_assessment: PASS - POST /api/services-australia/assess returns full assessment with recommendations

cgt_optimizer.cgt_analysis: PASS - POST /api/cgt-optimizer/analyze returns holding analysis with tax-loss harvesting opportunities
cgt_optimizer.wash_sale_check: PASS - GET /api/cgt-optimizer/wash-sale-check validates wash sale rules

partner_comparison.quick_compare: PASS - POST /api/partner-comparison/quick-compare returns confidence scores for both partners and together
partner_comparison.full_comparison: PASS - POST /api/partner-comparison/compare returns detailed synergy analysis
partner_comparison.partnership_benefits: PASS - GET /api/partner-comparison/benefits returns financial synergies info
